form.formComment: Last start was checked and broke when well beaten into eighth behind Phantom Star at this track over 1720m in a NR up to 47 on March 20 at $4.20. Raced better the start before that with a game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1720m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was leading 1.64 beaten 2.25 m by Jetasi (2:05.60) in NR up to 48 on March 12 at $1.20. No luck last but was racing well prior so deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 200m hung out and shortly after locked wheels with Jetasi.
Shifted out under pressure in the run to the finish.
Slightly out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Miss Blue Stork at this track over 2125m in a NR up to 48 on March 26 at $21. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Hesharley at this track over 1720m in a NR up to 48 on April 2 at $9. Close to a win.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 7th (Fr1) over 1720m after showing early speed at this track, at the bell was 4th-4.14 beaten 11 m by Hesharley (2:04.60) in NR up to 48 on April 2 at $4.60.
